title: Стандартные операторы: Where, Select, GroupBy, Join

cards.prompt: Where filters then Select projects (pipeline): squares of numbers > 2
cards.code: using System; using System.Linq; int[] n = [1,2,3,4,5,6]; var r = n.Where(x => x > 2).Select(x => x * x); Console.WriteLine(string.Join(",", r));

cards.prompt: GroupBy word length then count per group (docs example, deterministic)
cards.code: using System; using System.Linq; string[] words = "the quick brown fox".Split(" "); var g = words.GroupBy(w => w.Length).OrderBy(x => x.Key).Select(x => $"{x.Key}:{x.Count()}"); Console.WriteLine(string.Join(" ", g));

cards.prompt: Join preserves outer order then matching inner (inner join semantics)
cards.code: using System; using System.Linq; using System.Collections.Generic; var deps = new[]{new{Id=1,Name="Eng"},new{Id=2,Name="Math"}}; var studs = new[]{new{Dep=1,N="Ann"},new{Dep=2,N="Bob"},new{Dep=1,N="Cy"}}; var j = deps.Join(studs, d => d.Id, s => s.Dep, (d,s) => $"{s.N}->{d.Name}"); Console.WriteLine(string.Join(",", j));
